pages_default_Entry:{\"uid\":\"96b2e249-.title: Redefining how liturgies are planned
pages_default_Entry:{\"uid\":\"96b2e249-.text: Whether you are planning a single liturgy, or an entire season, Liturgia is designed for seamless and efficient preparation at any scale.

heroColumns_column_BlockType:{\"uid\":\".text: Access daily readings, prayers, and hymn suggestions effortlessly, streamlining planning without added complexity.
Effortlessly plan Masses, sacramental celebrations, and special liturgies with comprehensive tools to meet every possible need.
Engage children with meaningful and inspiring materials and resources designed to bring their faith journey to life.

modules_accordionItem_BlockType:{\"uid\".text: Access daily Mass readings, prayers, and hymn suggestions at a glance. Stay ahead with a complete Ordo and plan liturgical celebrations with ease.
Curated hymn recommendations for Sundays, Solemnities, and school liturgies. Includes special music selections for children’s liturgies, with more songs added regularly.
Engaging, age-appropriate resources to help children understand and participate in the liturgy. Includes weekly reflections and activity suggestions.

Ready-to-use templates for a variety of liturgical celebrations, including school Masses, Graduation Liturgies, Anzac Day, and liturgies for other special occasions like Mother's Day and Father's Day. The addition of new templates is ongoing and suggestions are invited.
Readings for Sundays, Solemnities and weekdays from the approved Children's Lectionary, ensuring age-appropriate engagement with the word of God.
Instant access to the full range of official liturgical books, including the Roman Missal, Book of Blessings, Eucharistic Prayers for Masses with Children, and other essential resources.
Convert your liturgy plans into fully-formatted Word documents, PDFs, or PowerPoint presentations in one click to enhance community participation.
Easily plan and prepare for baptisms, weddings, funerals, and other rituals with pre-formatted texts and structured guidance.
A growing collection of liturgical artwork and clip art to enrich worship aids, booklets, and presentations.

Liturgia is a web-based software that can be accessed on any modern device with an internet connection. To ensure the best user experience, we recommend the following:

Recommended Web Browsers
Google Chrome (latest version)
Mozilla Firefox (latest version)
Apple Safari (latest version)
Microsoft Edge (latest version)

Screen Resolution
For the best user experience, a screen resolution of at least 1280x720 is recommended. Higher resolutions (e.g., 1920x1080 or greater) will provide a more comfortable interface.

modules_column_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"e733.text: From a small parish to an entire diocese, from a single school to a diocesan-wide Catholic Education structure, Liturgia gives you the freedom to tailor your planning needs effortlessly and efficiently.

modules_wysiwyg_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"4cf.text4: The Features Backplate provides a straightforward way for apartments, businesses, and public car parks to future-proof their EV charging infrastructure. There's no need for a complete setup initially. Once the backplate is installed, the main infrastructure work is complete – when you're ready to add a charging station, simply fix the Features on to the backplate. This efficient approach offers the flexibility to expand at your own pace, making it as simple as it is smart.

modules_textAndMediaItem_BlockType:{\"ui.moduleTitle: Features backplate: the essence of future-ready

modules_wysiwyg_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"b2d.text4: Most buildings have three power phases, but consumption is rarely perfectly balanced between them. Since many EVs charge on just one phase, you risk reducing charging speeds drastically when many cars charge on the same phase. With our dynamic phase balancing, it’s as if we physically move cars around the parking lot to utilise all three phases evenly. Depending on your car, we can also switch between one and three-phase charging.

modules_textAndMediaItem_BlockType:{\"ui.moduleTitle: What makes our charging technology unique?
In-depth liturgy planning at your fingertips

modules_tag_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"5ed967d.moduleTitle: Real-time status on power and phase capacity

modules_cta_BlockType:{\"uid\":\"19d867f.text: We're leading the way on quality and safety for EV chargers.
